tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: You are given a brain MRI figure. What is the main problem in the hippocampus?

dialogs.thought: Check for any on-image labels/annotations that indicate the intended structure or finding.
Orient to modality/plane and identify any marked region (e.g., arrow) suggesting the focus.

content.content: Coronal brain MRI slice in grayscale with an arrow pointing to the medial temporal lobe region on the left side of the image; the temporal horns appear prominent suggesting medial temporal/hippocampal volume loss.

arguments.attribute: Describe the structure indicated by the arrow and any atrophy/volume loss in this medial temporal region

dialogs.thought: Verify the arrowed medial temporal structure and whether it appears atrophic, consistent with hippocampal atrophy.

content.content: In the arrowed medial temporal lobe region, the hippocampal formation appears small with widened surrounding CSF spaces and an enlarged adjacent temporal horn, consistent with marked hippocampal/medial temporal atrophy.

dialogs.content: The main focus of the image is the hippocampus, which is a region of the brain involved in learning and memory. The image shows severe hippocampal atrophy, which means that the hippocampus has significantly decreased in size.
